prestazioni: 1UZ-FE (4.0L V8) forced induction via HKS GT-SS turbo kit (GT2835 ball-bearing turbo, 10.5:1 compression forged internals, HKS F-Con V Pro standalone ECU with custom 1UZ-FE Stage 3 map for 450whp on 93 octane)

Full Tomei Powered EXPREME 4-2-1 stainless steel header with 60mm primary tubes, paired with a custom 3.5" dual exhaust system featuring Burns Stainless mufflers and 200-cell catalytic converters for optimal flow and sound tuning

KW Variant 3 coilovers with custom valving for LS400 chassis (front: 8kg spring rate, rear: 10kg spring rate), paired with Cusco front strut tower bar and rear subframe brace for rigidity, plus polyurethane bushings from SuperPro (part #SPF0115K)
estetica: Veilside Fortune 99 widebody conversion kit (front fenders, rear quarter panels, and custom carbon fiber side skirts) with custom-molded Lexus LS400-specific front bumper lip and rear diffuser by Rocket Bunny (Pandem LS400 rear bumper)

Custom 3-piece Work Meister S1 3P wheels (18x10 +25 front, 18x11 +30 rear) with 245/40/18 and 275/35/18 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires, paired with Brembo GT 6-piston front and 4-piston rear brake kit (355mm rotors) with custom stainless steel braided lines

Full interior reupholstery in Alcantara with custom Recaro SRD-E seats (LS400-specific mounting brackets), MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel with quick-release hub, and custom carbon fiber gauge cluster overlay by Seibon (OEM LS400 gauge pod compatibility)
